meta.name: Enviro Stopper®
meta.description: IP66/56 weatherproof protective cover for Stopper Station series buttons and equivalents
meta.heroTitle: IP66/56 Weatherproof Protective Cover for Stopper Station Series Buttons and Equivalents
meta.heroDescription:
Polycarbonate cover rated IP66/56 for protecting manual call points and switches against dust, water ingress and unauthorised access.

Available with optional sounder, labelled hood and various colour inserts.

Designed for wash-down areas, outdoor installations and environments requiring enhanced ingress protection.
